title: Senior Teacher - Byju's Digital Technologies - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Byju's Digital Technologies - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Byju's Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Senior Teacher at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Byju's Digital Technologies:
Byju's Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's Digital Technologies!
